steps.prompt: Some letters are made with a round curve — like c, o, d, and g. Find dog — it has two round letters!
steps.feedback: Dog! d and g — both made with a round curve. Find frog — spot the round o in the middle!
Frog! Did you feel that round o? Now find goat — two round letters again!
Goat! g and o — both round. Now find octopus — it starts with a big circle!
Octopus! That o leads the way. Last one — find crocodile — it's full of round letters!
Crocodile! c, r, o, c, o, d — five round letters in one word! You mastered the round letters!
